refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Task scheduling and dispatch system integrated with equipment telemetry.
DP3: Real-time productivity monitoring dashboard with alerting.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task scheduling
Data dependencies between monitoring and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires well-defined interfaces with task scheduling and monitoring to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for control optimization.
Risk that control algorithms may not adapt quickly enough to changing conditions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control and scheduling to reduce coupling and improve adaptability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operation optimization.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data and sends operational status updates.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments and scheduling information.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope, less focused containment for control algorithms.
High containment score due to direct control over equipment operation; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; mainly remote control, not direct optimization.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Embedding adaptive control algorithms within the Vehicle module ensures tight integration with equipment hardware and sensors, minimizing latency and maximizing responsiveness.
containment_risks: Potential difficulty in updating control algorithms if tightly coupled with embedded systems.
Risk of insufficient interface definition with Tasking module leading to integration issues.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts with Tasking and Telemetry modules to mitigate integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR of optimizing equipment operation to meet productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Potential diffusion if control logic is duplicated outside Vehicle module.
Interface mismatches with Tasking could cause integration delays.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for control algorithms, minimizing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing control performance on Vehicle hardware and validating productivity metrics.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control DP to Vehicle IM with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Strengthen interface definitions between Vehicle and Tasking modules.
Plan for modular updates to control algorithms to reduce embedded system update risks.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, interface definitions and modular update strategies require refinement to reduce integration and maintenance risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

revise.why: To improve interface clarity and modular update capability for the Vehicle module implementing control algorithms.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely.
Vehicle module can support embedded adaptive control algorithms.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and Tasking modules.
Difficulty in updating embedded control software.
evidence_needed: Interface specification documents between Vehicle and Tasking modules.
Demonstration of control algorithm update process on Vehicle hardware.
